summary: Plan-only PR remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No GitHub mutations are recommended because merge preflight proof is incomplete for every candidate; one small dirty PR has a concrete repair path, and the remaining PRs require maintainer judgment or ordinary non-mutating follow-up.

actions.reason: Independent PR with promising checks, but merge preflight is incomplete.
Broad feature scope, failed proof, waiting-on-author status, and unresolved bot-review proof require maintainer judgment before repair or merge.
Useful contributor PR is blocked by merge conflicts, not by product ambiguity.
Independent focused PR with passing checks, but merge preflight is incomplete.
Independent small PR with passing checks, but merge preflight is incomplete.

needs_human: #40874 requires maintainer judgment because it is a broad iOS feature PR with failed proof, waiting-on-author status, and unresolved review-bot evidence.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #72009 by rebasing or narrowly resolving conflicts on the existing maintainer-modifiable branch, preserving suntp's commits and attribution, then rerun the focused typing TTL/config validation before merge consideration.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair configurable typing indicator TTL PR
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs #72009 by resolving the current dirty merge state on the maintainer-modifiable contributor branch while preserving @suntp's implementation and attribution. The change keeps the configurable typingTtlSeconds path for session config and agent defaults, updates docs/schema/changelog as needed, and reruns the focused typing/config validation before merge consideration.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/72009
Linked issue: #71999
Credit: @suntp
credit_notes: Keep https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/72009 as the source PR in any repair or replacement notes.
